description: Comprehensive automation infrastructure for treating documentation as executable code

dispatches.task: Create CI/CD pipeline configuration for automated documentation testing that validates all code snippets in README.md and docs/ on every commit. Include Docker containers for consistent testing environments across platforms.

Develop comprehensive test suite using markdown-doctest or equivalent tool to extract and execute all code blocks from documentation files. Create test fixtures for commands that require specific inputs or environments.
Create automated documentation linting that validates code snippet syntax, checks for broken command references, and ensures all CLI commands mentioned in docs actually exist in the codebase.
Establish pre-commit hooks that prevent documentation commits if any code snippets fail execution. Create release gates that ensure documentation examples work correctly before version releases.
Optimize documentation testing performance by implementing smart caching, parallel execution of independent code snippets, and incremental testing that only validates changed documentation sections.
Create monitoring and alerting for documentation drift - detect when CLI commands change but documentation examples are not updated. Implement automated suggestions for fixing broken examples.
